inputs.corpus: A single observation in a 48-observation corpus: once, the agent set an environment variable QUILL_LOG_LEVEL=trace to debug one flaky test, then unset it. No other observation references this variable, log levels, or that test again. The remaining 47 observations are unrelated routine work.
inputs.existing_rules_summary: 3 active rules, none about logging configuration or env vars.

rule_under_test.name: always-set-trace-logging
rule_under_test.content: Always export QUILL_LOG_LEVEL=trace before running any test so failures are easier to diagnose.

expected_judgment.rationale: A single non-recurring debugging action does not establish a durable behavioral pattern. There is no repeated signal and no contradiction; promoting it adds noise without demonstrated benefit, so it is neither helpful nor actively harmful.
